Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: Additional valid values can be supplied by the state. 

Values and websites referenced may change over time. 

There is no single comprehensive list for procedure modifier codes, since each payer publishes only 
the codes that are applicable to that payer’s billing policy. Payers normally split the codes based on
